title: LA3 3BS, W. Lee Waste Oils Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3430UV/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: W. Lee Waste Oils Limited Installation name: Kierby Perry Yard Permit number: EPR/EP3430UV  "
